subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God! The Majesty of the All-Glorious and the Lord Peerless, exalted be His grandeur and His might supreme [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی جناب کبریاء و حضرت رب بیهمتا جلت عظمه و عظمت قدرته و کبر
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
